name: Conecta Envíos
tagline: Multi-tenant platform connecting wholesale providers with resellers
description: Conecta Envíos is a multi-tenant SaaS that connects wholesale providers with resellers. Providers manage their product catalog and team, resellers see only the catalogs assigned to them, and the platform automates shipping label generation and order tracking. Includes per-tenant theming, Instagram-based provider onboarding, CSV catalog imports, and SOAP integration with the Ramasil courier.
highlights: Multi-tenant architecture with three roles: admin, provider, reseller
Passwordless OTP authentication with email invitations
Provider onboarding from Instagram handle (auto-fills name, description, logo)
Product catalog with manual and CSV import
Shipping label generation and order management workflow
Per-user theme system with multiple visual presets
aiDetails: Built with Claude Code (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and .claude/ directory with skills configured)
